title: ShotPlan: Cinematic Video Generation with Learnable Planning Token
innovation_summary: ShotPlan: Cinematic Video Generation with Learnable Planning Token: To address this challenge, we propose ShotPlan, a framework for explicit multi-shot cinematic video generation built upon a video diffusion foundation model.
